title: Adventure Time And Craft
description: What time is it? ITS ADVENTURE TIME!
body:
# **What is this mod?**
What time is it? ITS ADVENTURE TIME!
This mod adds swords weapons areas and a few others from the show adventure time

# **Features**
All of Finn's weapon's that he uses in the show
The 4 Kingdoms
The Enchiridion
Music discs
Paintings
Foods
# **Usage**
Any versons after the first one will require geckolib
# **Compatability**
No known issues with bugs and stuff from other mods!
# **Upcomming features**
**EVERYTHING IN THIS SECTION IS POSSIBLY SUBJECT TO CHANGE OR TO BE SCRAPPED**
# **Structures**
The Destroyed cities That are found after the Mushroom War
Founders island,
Finn and jakes treehouse
**idk what else to put so ill update this when i get new ideas.**
# **Mobs**
all kingdom variants of mobs such as pigs chickens cows sheep
Vampires
**thats all of the upcomming features rn anything after this is in the mod**
# **Music disc's**
[Fallen Hero Retake](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ujhhWahfwBA)

[Suffering Siblings V3](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VZepgSxbGio)

[Adventure time opening theme](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v_am43iRm-A&t=4s)

[Island song (come along with me)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xXQNdUpCQzw)

# **Biomes**
**Flame Kingdom**
**Slime kindom**
